metadata.name: Batterskull Living Weapon — ETB trigger creates Germ token attached with +4/+4
metadata.description: p1 casts Batterskull ({5} Artifact Equipment). On resolution it enters the battlefield and the Living Weapon triggered ability fires (CR 702.92a): create a 0/0 black Phyrexian Germ creature token, then attach Batterskull to it. The trigger resolves using CreateTokenAndAttachSource — the Germ and attachment are atomic, so the Germ immediately has Batterskull's +4/+4, vigilance, and lifelink, making it effectively a 4/4. No zero-toughness SBA fires (CR 704.5f) because the attachment occurs before SBAs are checked. Final state: Batterskull and the Phyrexian Germ token both on p1's battlefield, with the Germ effectively 4/4 with vigilance and lifelink.
metadata.generation_notes: Batterskull oracle text (Scryfall verified via MCP): '{5}, Artifact — Equipment. Living weapon (When this Equipment enters, create a 0/0 black Phyrexian Germ creature token, then attach this to it.) Equipped creature gets +4/+4 and has vigilance and lifelink. {3}: Return this Equipment to its owner's hand. Equip {5}.' CardDefinition confirmed in crates/engine/src/cards/definitions.rs:1511-1563: LivingWeapon keyword wired in builder.rs:587-616 as TriggerEvent::SelfEntersBattlefield → Effect::CreateTokenAndAttachSource { spec: Phyrexian Germ 0/0 black Phyrexian/Germ subtypes }. Key ruling (2020-08-07): 'The Germ token enters the battlefield as a 0/0 creature and the Equipment becomes attached to it before state-based actions would cause the token to die.' This means the 0/0 toughness SBA (CR 704.5f) does NOT apply because Batterskull's +4/+4 static effect grants toughness atomically with attachment. The trigger goes on the stack after Batterskull enters the battlefield (CR 603.2, 603.3). Both players pass priority, trigger resolves. After resolution: Germ is 4/4 with vigilance and lifelink. Mana setup: p1 has 5 colorless mana in pool (representing 5 generic from any source) to pay Batterskull's {5} cost. The combat portion (Germ attacking with lifelink) is intentionally omitted from this script — the declare_attackers harness action requires the initial game state to be in the declare_attackers step/phase, which cannot be combined in a single linear script that starts in precombat_main. A separate combat script can demonstrate the equipped Germ attacking with lifelink damage.

script.step_note: p1 casts Batterskull ({5}) from hand. Both players pass, Batterskull resolves and enters battlefield. Living Weapon ETB trigger fires, then resolves to create Germ token and attach Batterskull.

actions.description: Initial: Batterskull in p1 hand, battlefield empty, stack empty
actions.note: p1 has 5 colorless mana in pool to pay Batterskull's {5} generic cost.
CR 601.2: p1 casts Batterskull as an artifact spell. {5} generic paid from pool.

actions.description: After casting: Batterskull on stack, hand empty
actions.note: Batterskull is on the stack as an artifact spell awaiting resolution.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — top of stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Batterskull (permanent spell) resolves and enters the battlefield under p1's control.

CR 702.92a: Living weapon triggered ability fires — 'When this Equipment enters, create a 0/0 black Phyrexian Germ creature token, then attach this Equipment to it.' Trigger is placed on the stack (CR 603.2, 603.3).

actions.note: CR 608.2: Batterskull enters battlefield; Living Weapon ETB trigger goes on stack.

actions.description: After Batterskull enters: Batterskull on battlefield, Living Weapon trigger on stack
actions.note: Batterskull has entered the battlefield. The Living Weapon trigger is on the stack. No Germ token exists yet — the token is created when the trigger resolves.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Living Weapon trigger resolves.

resolution.note: CR 702.92a: Creates a 0/0 black Phyrexian Germ creature token and attaches Batterskull to it atomically (Effect::CreateTokenAndAttachSource). Per ruling (2020-08-07), the attachment occurs before SBAs can cause the 0/0 Germ to die. With Batterskull attached, the Germ gains +4/+4 (becomes effectively 4/4), vigilance, and lifelink from Batterskull's static continuous effect (layer 7c for P/T, layer 6 for abilities).

actions.note: CR 608.2: Trigger resolves. CreateTokenAndAttachSource atomically creates the Germ and attaches Batterskull. The Germ's effective toughness is 0 + 4 = 4. No zero-toughness SBA fires.

CR 704.3: SBAs checked after trigger resolves. CR 704.5f: The Germ token has base 0 toughness but receives +4 from Batterskull (attached atomically), giving effective toughness 4. Toughness > 0, so the zero-toughness SBA does NOT apply. Both Batterskull and Germ remain on battlefield.

actions.description: Final: Batterskull and Phyrexian Germ both on p1 battlefield, stack empty
actions.note: Batterskull (Equipment) and the Phyrexian Germ token are both on p1's battlefield. The Germ is 0/0 base + 4/4 from Batterskull = effectively 4/4 with vigilance and lifelink. The 0/0 base toughness did NOT cause the Germ to die because the Equipment attachment is atomic with token creation (CR 702.92a, ruling 2020-08-07).
